title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 28 2026
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 28/01/2026
Image reference: 2026-01-28_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-28-2026_img1.png
Bulkers: Market sentiment remains cautious as buyers assess freight rate volatility and ongoing uncertainties surroundingglobal trade dynamics and Chinese demand fundamentals. With these uncertainties, we have continued to see buyers willing to pay premiums for modern Ultramax tonnage. Capesize Frontier Kotobuki (174,800 DWT, Jan 2011, Namura) sold SS/DD Passed to European buyers for USD 31.4 mil, VV Value USD 31.15 mil
Kamsarmax Fjeld Svea (81,500 DWT, Jun 2013, SPP) sold inc.
